goal: real WASAPI shared mode runtime with COM initialization, device enumeration, format negotiation, and buffer operations

current_interface.responsibility: Write PCM data to WASAPI shared mode buffer

current_internal_state.responsibility: Internal WASAPI state hidden behind opaque handle

current_implementation.notes: Implements interface but may not use real WASAPI APIs

current_test_coverage.reality_proof: Checks WASAPI availability before tests, skips if unavailable

reality_proof_requirements.real_com_initialization: Must initialize COM with CoInitializeEx and MTA
reality_proof_requirements.real_device_enumeration: Must enumerate audio devices with IMMDeviceEnumerator
reality_proof_requirements.real_format_negotiation: Must negotiate shared-mode format with IAudioClient
reality_proof_requirements.real_start_stop: Must use Start/Stop on audio client

required_reality_tests: Real COM Initialization Test: Verify COM initialized with MTA
Real Device Enumeration Test: Verify device enumeration works
Real Default Endpoint Test: Verify default render endpoint obtained
Real Format Negotiation Test: Verify shared-mode format negotiation
Real Audio Client Test: Verify IAudioClient initialization
Real Render Client Test: Verify IAudioRenderClient obtained
Real Buffer Operations Test: Verify GetBuffer/ReleaseBuffer work
Real Start/Stop Test: Verify Start/Stop operations work
test_requirements: All tests must use real WASAPI interfaces (not stubs)
Tests must handle device unavailable scenario honestly
Evidence must prove real WASAPI runtime, not just interface contract

inspector_snapshot_requirements.wasapi_runtime_snapshot: com_state, device_info, format, audio_client, render_client, buffer_stats

decision_ledger_requirements.wasapi_operation_decision: Input: endpoint, PCM data; Output: success, samples_written

schema_gate_requirements.com_initialized_required: com_initialized must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.device_enumerated_required: device_enumerated must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.format_negotiated_required: format_negotiated must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.buffer_operations_required: buffer_operations must be real for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.anti_fake_validation: no stub WASAPI or mock COM

real_wasapi_runtime_proof: Real COM initialization: CoInitializeEx with MTA
Real format negotiation: IAudioClient::GetMixFormat and Initialize
Real buffer operations: IAudioRenderClient::GetBuffer and ReleaseBuffer

workspace_requirements: No generated audio files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real WASAPI shared mode runtime
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real WASAPI without real COM
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim buffer operations without real operations
Never claim Start/Stop without real operations

reason: WASAPI shared runtime audit planned. Current interface is stub implementation (CONTRACT_PASS). Real WASAPI runtime with COM initialization, device enumeration, format negotiation, and buffer operations required for RUNTIME_PASS. Windows platform required.
